summary: This document displays the console output of a program named HERETIC, version 1.0.0, running on an NVIDIA A100 GPU. It details the process of loading a large language model (openai/gpt-oss-20b), loading both good and bad prompts, determining an optimal batch size for processing, and then loading evaluation prompts to count model refusals. The process concludes with an initial refusal count of 97 out of 100 for harmful behaviors.
